_description: Cross-agent findings bus. feedback-loop-agent writes here weekly. signal-agent and orchestrator read at startup to adjust behaviour. Never delete entries — mark expired via expires_at. Add new findings only.

_schema.finding_type: signal_accuracy | elo_validity | category_performance | tier_performance | strategy_performance | pre_resolution_accuracy
_schema.confidence: HIGH (>=20 samples) | MEDIUM (10-19 samples) | LOW (<10 samples, note limitations)
_schema.sample_size: number of resolved markets this finding is based on
_schema.summary: one sentence plain English — what did we learn

detail.baseline: what we expected or what random would give
detail.weeks_observed: how many weeks of data supports this

_schema.actionable: true if signal-agent or orchestrator should change behaviour
_schema.expires_at: ISO8601 — 90 days from generated_at, after which finding may be removed

findings.summary: Pre-resolution intelligence baseline established — first resolution batch resolved April 2026
findings.action_recommendation: No action yet — await first resolution batch. feedback-loop-agent to update after April 1 2026.

signals_in_batch.market: Russia x Ukraine ceasefire by March 31 2026
Trump out as President by March 31
Will Anthropic have the best AI model at the end of March 2026
Will xAI have the best AI model at the end of March 2026

findings.summary: First pre-resolution signal batch: 2/4 correct (50%) — at baseline, below the 60% Phase 5 gate threshold. Small sample, inconclusive.
findings.action_recommendation: Continue collecting. Minimum 10 resolved markets required before drawing conclusions. Signal 1 (Russia/Ukraine at 93% smart money) was a significant miss — watch for overconfidence in geopolitical consensus signals.

findings.summary: Bidirectional holders are a documented structural feature of Polymarket — liquidity providers simultaneously hold YES and NO positions to capture spread, not to express directional views. Must be filtered before any trader counts as a directional signal.

detail.value: unknown — requires quantification in future runs

findings.action_recommendation: signal-agent must exclude any trader holding both YES and NO capital in the same market from directional signal counts. Only traders with zero opposing capital qualify as genuine directional signals. This filter should be applied before ELO convergence counting. External sources confirm LPs are a significant fraction of high-volume traders on Polymarket (ChainCatcher 2025 analysis, Polymarket official documentation).

findings.summary: Insufficient resolved signals to compute accuracy — 0 resolved, 10 required
findings.action_recommendation: Await 10 more signal resolutions before drawing conclusions

findings.summary: ELITE tier consensus accuracy: 72% over 29 non-sports markets
findings.action_recommendation: Increase ELITE tier weighting — exceeds 60% accuracy

findings.summary: QUALIFIED tier consensus accuracy: 81% over 153 non-sports markets
findings.action_recommendation: Increase QUALIFIED tier weighting — exceeds 60% accuracy

findings.summary: 1 strategy/strategies overdue for revalidation: STR-001 — Elite Convergence Signal
findings.action_recommendation: Revalidation signals written to signals.json — backtest-agent to action

findings.summary: RQ3.2 preliminary: INCONCLUSIVE — n=4 qualifying markets after clean filters, below 10-market minimum. Legendary traders cluster within 5-10pp of market price on filtered markets, providing insufficient divergence for meaningful testing. Methodology may be testing wrong signal.

detail.methodology_note: Tests aggregate legendary consensus vs market price. May be measuring post-information-incorporation rather than predictive lead. Directional single-trader signals (zero opposing hedge) may be more appropriate test — see RQ2.2.

findings.action_recommendation: Do not trigger stop condition. Reframe RQ3.2 as RQ2.2 (entry timing advantage for directional legendary traders). Rerun when more resolved filtered markets available — need minimum 10 markets with 2+ directional legendary traders and 5pp+ divergence. Current constraint: only 22 markets have 2+ legendary traders after filtering.

findings.summary: RQ2.2 preliminary: YES positions at 95% directional threshold show 75% positive price movement within 7 days — above 60% pass criterion. NO positions show 0% at all thresholds. Average movement near-zero across all configurations. INCONCLUSIVE — magnitude criterion not met, NO signal broken, n=13 too thin.

detail.key_finding: YES positions at 95% threshold: 75% positive movement. NO positions: 0% across all thresholds — structural weakness, 7-day window likely too short for NO timing.
detail.next_test: Extend post-entry window to 14 and 30 days — magnitude may require more time

findings.action_recommendation: Signal-agent should use 95% directional threshold for YES positions only. NO positions need separate methodology — possibly measure over 14-30 day window rather than 7 days. Rerun RQ2.2 with extended windows before treating NO signals as actionable.

findings.summary: RQ1.1 rerun with point-in-time ELO (elo_period1_cutoff): INCONCLUSIVE — n=16, below 30-trader minimum. r=+0.175 near zero, statistically indistinguishable from noise. Previous run used retrospective ELO giving r=-0.194 — direction flip confirms point-in-time fix was necessary. Root constraint: Period 2 only 25 days old, only 47 traders have any P2 activity.

detail.fix_applied: elo_period1_cutoff used instead of comprehensive_elo — direction flip validates fix was necessary

findings.action_recommendation: Rerun after 2026-06-01 when Period 2 will have ~60 days of resolved markets and significantly more qualifying traders. Do not trigger stop condition — n=16 is a timing constraint not a signal failure. The near-zero correlation with clean data is inconclusive, not a fail.
